Name: SCOPE NOTE
Description: Service catalog covers diagnostics, troubleshooting, and inspections only. Once the issue is identified, the repair/fix estimate uses the Old Work Catalog. No after-hours or emergency rates. No material costs — this is labor/diagnostic only.

Name: Diagnostic / Troubleshooting — Hourly Rate
Description: Hourly diagnostic rate for electrical troubleshooting and problem identification. 1-hour minimum. RATE TBD.

Name: Circuit Tracing — Single Circuit
Description: Trace one circuit from breaker to all endpoints using toner/tracer or breaker-off method. Identify and document what is on the circuit.

Name: Full Panel Trace + Label (up to 20 circuits)
Description: Trace every circuit in panel, identify all endpoints (receptacles, lights, appliances), update panel directory label. Label kit included.

Name: Full Panel Trace + Label (21-42 circuits)
Description: Trace every circuit in panel (21-42 circuits), identify all endpoints, update panel directory label. Label kit included.

Name: Dead Circuit — Troubleshoot
Description: Locate cause of dead circuit (no power). Test breaker, connections, and wiring to identify open, loose connection, or damaged conductor.

Name: Tripping Breaker (Standard) — Troubleshoot
Description: Determine cause of standard breaker tripping. Test for overload, short circuit, or ground fault. Isolate to specific device or section.

Name: AFCI Breaker Nuisance Trip — Troubleshoot
Description: Diagnose AFCI breaker nuisance tripping. Isolate arc-fault source — may require disconnecting devices, checking connections, identifying incompatible devices.

Name: GFCI Troubleshoot (receptacle or breaker)
Description: Diagnose GFCI that won't reset or keeps tripping. Test device, downstream wiring, and connected loads for ground faults.

Name: Ground Fault Locating
Description: Isolate ground fault on a circuit. Systematically disconnect sections and devices to pinpoint fault location.

Name: Short Circuit Locating
Description: Isolate short circuit on a circuit. Systematically disconnect sections and devices to pinpoint short location.

Name: Open Neutral / Open Hot Locating
Description: Find break in conductor (open neutral or open hot). Test at boxes and junctions to narrow down location of break.

Name: Flickering / Intermittent Power — Diagnose
Description: Diagnose intermittent power issues (flickering lights, intermittent outlets). Requires extended testing at connections, splices, and panel. May require multiple test points.

Name: Outlet / Switch Not Working — Diagnose
Description: Diagnose single non-working outlet or switch. Test device, wiring, and upstream connections.

Name: Voltage Drop Testing
Description: Measure voltage drop across a circuit run under load. Identify undersized conductors, bad connections, or excessive run lengths.

Name: Load Calculation — Determine Panel/Service Capacity
Description: Calculate existing electrical load per NEC Article 220 to determine if panel/service can support added loads (EV charger, hot tub, addition, etc.). Provide written summary.

Name: Panel Inspection / Evaluation
Description: Inspect existing panel for condition, hazards, code violations, and capacity. Check for recalled panel brands (Federal Pacific, Zinsco, etc.). Provide written assessment and recommendations.

Name: Whole-Home Electrical Safety Inspection
Description: Walk entire electrical system. Test all accessible receptacles (polarity, ground, GFCI function). Check panel condition, grounding/bonding, smoke/CO detectors, exterior fixtures, visible wiring condition. Provide written report.

Name: Code Compliance Evaluation
Description: Evaluate electrical system against current NEC for compliance. Identify code violations and recommend corrections. For insurance, sale, or renovation purposes. Provide written report.

Name: Pre-Purchase Electrical Evaluation
Description: Comprehensive electrical evaluation for home buyers. Inspect panel, service, grounding, wiring type/condition, device function, GFCI/AFCI protection, and overall safety. Provide written report with findings and cost estimates for recommended work.
